overall.description: A static first-person view from a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment bedroom overlooking a foggy cityscape. The scene features high-quality game engine graphics with moody blue-grey lighting, an unmade bed in the foreground, and flying vehicles occasionally passing by the large window.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk high-rise apartment bedroom with panoramic city view

second flying vehicle passes by outside the window

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling panoramic window overlooking the foggy city
unmade bed with rumpled silver satin sheets and pillows
dark tiled wall covered with various papers, photos, and notes

silhouettes of skyscrapers barely visible through the fog outside

segments.scene_description: A stationary first-person view from a cyberpunk apartment bedroom. The camera overlooks a foggy cityscape through a large floor-to-ceiling window while flying vehicles periodically pass by. Inside, an unmade bed with silver sheets sits in the foreground, and a tiled wall with various attached items is visible to the left. The lighting is dim and moody with a cool blue-grey color palette.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary first-person perspective within a dimly lit cyberpunk bedroom that overlooks a dense, foggy cityscape. It begins with a focus on the interior's moody blue-grey atmosphere, where an unmade bed with silver sheets occupies the foreground. As the gaze lingers, the view extends toward a tiled wall adorned with various attachments to the left before shifting toward the expansive floor-to-ceiling window. The scene then opens up to the urban exterior, where the cool lighting blends with the haze of the city as flying vehicles periodically glide past the glass.
